description.23000076: Shelly's Super shells slow down enemies for {0} seconds!
description.23000077: Colt's movement speed is increased by {0}%.
description.23000078: When Bull falls below {0} health, his reload speed doubles!
description.23000079: Rocket Rain now rains down {0} more rockets.
description.23000080: Rico's bullets, from attack and Super alike, get supercharged by their first bounce and deal +{0} damage!
description.23000082: Barley regains {0} health from each attack.
description.23000083: Jessie can repair her gun turret for {0} of its missing health by zapping it with her attack.
description.23000084: Nita recovers {0} health whenever her bear hits an enemy brawler. When Nita deals damage to an enemy brawler, her bear regains {0} health.
description.23000085: Dynamike can ride the blast wave of his explosives to jump over obstacles!
description.23000086: Enemies caught in El Primo's Super will burn for {0} damage over {1} seconds.
description.23000087: Mortis reaps the life essence of Brawler he defeats, restoring {0} of his health.
description.23000089: When Poco's attack hits friendly Brawler they now heal for {0} health.
description.23000135: When Shelly falls below {0} health, she instantly heals for {1} health. Band-aid recharges in {2} seconds.
description.23000136: Nita's Bear attacks faster. Time between swipes is reduced by {0}%.
description.23000137: When Bull falls below {0} health, he gains a shield that reduces all damage he takes by {1}%.
description.23000138: Colt's attack range is {0} and bullet speed is increased by {1}%.
description.23000140: El Primo gains a {0}% speed boost for {1} seconds after using his Super.
description.23000144: Poco's Super now also hits enemies, dealing {0} damage.
description.23000149: Scrappy the Turret now shoots energy orbs that bounce between enemies. The orbs' range after a bounce is {0}% of normal range.
description.23000150: Brock loads a fourth rocket into his launcher, increasing his ammo capacity (and discarding the thermos bottle he's been keeping in his launcher's #4 tube).
description.23000154: Mortis gains his longer dash {0} seconds faster.
description.23000156: When Rico falls below {0} health, he runs {1}% faster!
description.23000158: Adds +{0} damage per second to Barley's attack.
description.23000245: Brock blasts the ground below him and propels himself into the air. The explosion deals {0} damage to nearby enemies.
description.23000246: Rico blasts waves of bouncy {1} bullet s in all directions {0} times.
description.23000249: Nita commands her bear to slam the ground, stunning all enemies within its reach for {0} seconds after a delay of {1} seconds.
description.23000250: Barley drops a sticky concoction that leaves a puddle, slowing down all enemies that make contact with it.
description.23000251: Jessie triggers a shockwave from her turret, slowing down all enemies {0} seconds within its area of effect.
description.23000255: Shelly dashes ahead, skipping a few unneccessary steps {0} tiles!
description.23000258: Dynamike spins furiously with increased movement speed {0}% and throws {1} sticks of dynamite around himself. Each dynamite deals {2} damage to enemies.
description.23000264: El Primo grabs the closest enemy in {0} tiles within his reach and flips them {1} tiles like a pancake over his broad shoulders.
description.23000265: Mortis spins his shovel, hitting all enemies around himself for {0} damage.
description.23000267: Poco and all nearby allies heal {1} health per second for {0} seconds.
description.23000272: Bull instantly rejuvenates himself for {0} health.
description.23000288: On activation, for the next {0} seconds Shelly's main attacks focuses the fire to a smaller area {1}° with an increased range {2} tiles.
description.23000292: El Primo summons a small meteor to strike the nearest enemy. It deals {0} damage and destroys walls.
description.23000293: Barley throws a healing potion at nearby allies that creates an area that heals for {0} health per second.
description.23000294: Once activated, the next main attack also stuns enemies for {0} seconds.
description.23000295: Scrappy's attack speed is doubled for {0} seconds.
description.23000310: Bull can interrupt his Super charge and slow all nearby opponents with a massive stomp for {0} seconds.
description.23000314: For the next {0} seconds, Nita's bear gets a {1}% shield against damage.
description.23000316: Brock's next attack is a mega rocket that is bigger, badder, {0}% faster, and destroys walls.
description.23000319: Colt's next attack is one powerful shot that deals {0} damage, while going through obstacles and opponents alike.
description.23000350: Removes active adverse effects from friendly brawlers in a large area and gives a {0} second immunity.
description.23000409: Rico's next attack will heal him for {0} health from each bounce of a projectile.
description.62000000: Get a SPEED INCREASE when moving in bushes by {0}%.
description.62000002: Deal {0}% EXTRA DAMAGE when below {1}% Health.
description.62000003: REVEAL opponents {0} seconds after dealing damage to them.
description.62000004: Gain extra {0} HEALTH as a consumable SHIELD. The shield regenerates in {1} seconds, when at full health.
description.62000008: Extends the reach of Gene's Magic Hand {0} tiles.
description.62000011: Leon's Smoke Bomb lasts {x} seconds longer.
description.62000012: Enemies inside of Sandy's Sandstorm deal {0}% less damage.
description.62000013: Amber's oil spills now also slow down enemies by {0}%.
description.62000016: Increases the healing of Pam's turret by {0}%
description.62000017: Increases number of Gadget usages per battle by {0}
description.62000018: The speed of bats increased by {0}%
description.23000263: Bo places a totem that recharges his and any allies' Supers {1}% more within the area of effect of the {0} tile range. For {2} seconds the totem slowly loses its health over time.
description.23000289: Bo triggers all of his mines after {0} seconds. During the delay the mines are completely undetectable to opponents.
description.23000090: Bo spots enemies hidden in bushes from {0}% longer distance than normally.
description.23000148: Instead of a knockback, Bo's traps now stun the enemy for {0} seconds!
description.23000081: After using Super, Spike regenerates {0} health per second by staying in its area of effect.
description.23000151: Spikes from the cactus grenade fly in a curving motion, making it easier to hit targets.
description.23000247: Spike shoots {0} waves of needles in all directions, dealing {1} damage per hit.
description.23000406: Spike grows a large cactus with {0} health to give cover to friendlies. If destroyed, the cactus bursts, and all nearby friendlies recover {1} health.
description.23000458: Crow's poison saps the strength of enemies, who deal {0}% less damage while poisoned.
description.23000143: Crow deals +{1} damage with his attack and Super to targets with {0}% or less health.
description.23000243: Crow gets a shield for {1}% of incoming damage for {0} seconds.
description.23000286: All currently poisoned enemies are slowed for {0} seconds.
